submission.workflow_yaml:
name: concurrency-08-job-level
on: workflow_dispatch
jobs:
  one:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    concurrency:
      group: job-level-serial
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: one
        run: |
          echo "SCENARIO=08-job-level job=one"
          sleep 5
          echo "DONE=one"
  two:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    concurrency:
      group: job-level-serial
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: two
        run: |
          echo "SCENARIO=08-job-level job=two"
          sleep 4
          echo "DONE=two"
